rationale: The agent read Issue #1 and examined the repository structure, reading docs/index.md, docs/getting-started.md, mkdocs.yml, and many other files to understand the codebase. However, the trace shows no create_or_update_file attempts or any write operations targeting the files that need modification. The task requires implementing a fix (correcting the broken link), but the agent only performed read operations without attempting to modify any files. There are no write attempts—even blocked ones—showing the agent attempted to correct the broken link in getting-started.md or related files.
